title: potentilla fragariastrum
intro: Potentilla fragariastrum, also known as Trifid Potentilla, is a flowering plant species within the rose family, characterized by its trifoliate leaves and pink to white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla fragariastrum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in tinctures, teas, and infusions, often used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
